title: vittadinia australasica var. oricola
intro: Vittadinia australasica var. oricola is a lesser-known variety of the Vittadinia australasica plant, also known as the New South Wales daisy or Billy buttons, which is a flowering plant native to Australia. While I couldn't find any specific information on the medicinal properties of Vittadinia australasica var. oricola, the general Vittadinia australasica plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations. In terms of herbal preparations, Vittadinia australasica is traditionally used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its specific preparations for Vittadinia australasica var. oricola are unclear.
